name: Dropshots Pickleball LLC
description: Dropshots Pickleball LLC is a place to play pickleball in White Mills, PA. There are 6 indoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, food, and trainers or lessons.

name: Wayne County YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Wayne County YMCA in Honesdale, PA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.
